---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: []
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the use case first, then the proposed feature.
"I'm always frustrated when..." is a good starting point. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A clear, concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit. -->

## Scope check

Please check [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) before opening. If your request:

- [ ] is **already planned** (in `Released` or `Upcoming` sections) — link to that line instead
- [ ] is **on the "Explicit non-goals" list** — please don't open; the answer is no
- [ ] is **a new style profile** — open a [Profile contribution](?template=profile_contribution.md) issue instead
- [ ] is **none of the above** — proceed

## Are you willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to send the PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, examples from other tools, anything else. -->
